# Automation

## Observed Text

- Every 10 cards you draw, gain 1 energy.

## Strategy Notes

- Stronger in draw-heavy Ironclad decks with Pommel Strike, Flash of Steel, Burning Pact, Bag of Preparation, Pollinous Core, and Cascade-style cycling; install before long boss fights when the deck can spend the extra energy.
